name: humanspec_DEFB_cluster_bonobo
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: DEFB_cluster. Status in Pan paniscus: 'defensin_CNV_block'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr8:~7.6 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr8. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for DEFB_cluster. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. DEFB_cluster)
